prs.title: Fix Expo Web compatibility, macOS port conflict, and add cross-platfo…
Fix terminal icon picker placement
prs.body: Fixes #211083. The terminal icon picker was using 'quickPickTop' offset which caused it to overlay the title bar when the Command Center is enabled. This change updates it to use 'activeContainerOffset.top' to ensure it appears below the title bar.

prs.title: Fix: Consistent formatting for NewExpression with type cast (#18406)
prs.body:
## Description

Fixes #18406

Previously, `NewExpression` with a type cast was formatted inconsistently compared to `CallExpression`, causing it to break onto multiple lines unnecessarily.

This PR adds a check for `NewExpression` in `cast-expression.js` (specifically checking `parent.type === "NewExpression"`) to align the formatting logic with `CallExpression`.

## Checklist

- [x] I’ve added tests to confirm my change works.
- [ ] (If changing the API or CLI) I’ve documented the changes I’ve made (in the `docs/` directory).
- [x] (If the change is user-facing) I’ve added my changes to `changelog_unreleased/*/XXXX.md` file following `changelog_unreleased/TEMPLATE.md`.
- [x] I’ve read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).

prs.title: Fix: Consistent formatting for NewExpression with type cast (#18406)
prs.body:
Fixes #18406

## Summary
Previously, `NewExpression` with a type cast was formatted inconsistently compared to `CallExpression`, causing it to break onto multiple lines unnecessarily.

This PR adds a check for `NewExpression` in `cast-expression.js` (specifically checking `parent.type === "NewExpression"`) to align the formatting logic with `CallExpression`.

## Changes
- Modified `printBinaryCastExpression` in `src/language-js/print/cast-expression.js`.
- Added a regression test case in `tests/format/typescript/cast/gh-18406.ts`.

## Test Plan
Ran `yarn jest tests/format/typescript/cast` and verified that the snapshot was updated to show the correct formatting.

prs.title: Fix: Handle encoded dots (%2e) in filesystem routing for static pages
prs.body:
### What?
Fixes an issue where URLs containing `%2e` (encoded dot) were failing to resolve to filesystem paths for static pages, resulting in 404 errors.

### Why?
The server was treating `%2e` as a filename character instead of normalizing it to a dot `.`. This prevented matching against folder names like `my.folder` when the URL was `/my%2efolder`.

### How?
Added a normalization step in `base-server.ts` to replace `%2e` (case-insensitive) with `.` before route matching occurs.

Fixes #86717

prs.title: fix: change cursor to default for pen tool
prs.body:
Closes #10416

This PR changes the cursor from `crosshair` to the `default` pointer when using the Pen (Freedraw) tool, improving visibility and UX.

## Type of change
- [x] Bug fix / Improvement

prs.title: fix: allow empty keys assertion when target object is empty
prs.body:
### Description
This PR fixes the issue where expecting empty keys on an empty object would throw "keys required".

It allows: `expect({}).to.have.all.keys([])` to pass.

### History
This is a manual revival of PR #1384 by @Zirak. I have reapplied the logic to the latest codebase and added a regression test.

Closes #1384

prs.title: chore: organize and expand .gitignore for better project hygiene
prs.body:
Refactored the .gitignore file to be more maintainable:
- Grouped rules into clear categories (Dependencies, Build, OS, IDE).
- Added missing system exclusions (.DS_Store, Thumbs.db) to prevent repo pollution.
- Added missing editor exclusions (.idea, .vscode).
- Standardized env file exclusions.

labels.name: permissions in review
labels.description: We are checking if permission is needed to include this icon. Take no action in the meantime.

prs.body:
### Checklist

- [x] I have reviewed the [forbidden brands](https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/blob/develop/CONTRIBUTING.md#forbidden-brands) list and confirm the brand I am submitting a PR for is not one of them, nor is it a subsidiary of one of those brands
- [x] I have reviewed the brand's terms of service, and am confident we can add this icon
- [x] I optimized the icon with SVGO or SVGOMG
- [x] The SVG `viewbox` is `0 0 24 24`

**Source:** https://www.lenskart.com/
